1	
2	---------------------------- MODULE BPConProof_line4176 ------------------------------
3	
4	EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets, TLAPS
5	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
6	
7	AXIOM EmptySetFinite == IsFiniteSet({})
8	
9	AXIOM SingletonSetFinite == \A e : IsFiniteSet({e})
10	
11	AXIOM ImageOfFiniteSetFinite == 
12	         \A S, f : IsFiniteSet(S) => IsFiniteSet({f[x] : x \in S})
13	
14	AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
15	        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)
16	
17	AXIOM UnionOfFiniteSetsFinite == 
18	        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ IsFiniteSet(S)  => IsFiniteSet(S \cup T)
19	
20	----------------------------------------------------------------------------
21	
22	CONSTANT Value
23	
24	Ballot == Nat
25	
26	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------  
27	
28	CONSTANTS Acceptor,       
29	          FakeAcceptor,   
30	          ByzQuorum,     
31	
32	          WeakQuorum     
33	
34	ByzAcceptor == Acceptor \cup FakeAcceptor
35	
36	ASSUME BallotAssump == (Ballot \cup {-1}) \cap ByzAcceptor = {}
37	
38	ASSUME BQA == 
39	          /\ Acceptor \cap FakeAcceptor = {}
40	          /\ \A Q \in ByzQuorum : Q \subseteq ByzAcceptor
41	          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in ByzQuorum : Q1 \cap Q2 \cap Acceptor # {}
42	          /\ \A Q \in WeakQuorum : /\ Q \subseteq ByzAcceptor
43	                                   /\ Q \cap Acceptor # {}
44	
45	ASSUME BQLA == 
46	          /\ \E Q \in ByzQuorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
47	          /\ \E Q \in WeakQuorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
48	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
49	
50	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
51	
52	VARIABLES maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent, bmsgs
53	
54	KnowsSafeAt(ac, b, v) ==
55	  LET S == {m \in knowsSent[ac] : m.bal = b}
56	  IN  \/ \E BQ \in ByzQuorum :
57	           \A a \in BQ : \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
58	                                      /\ m.mbal = -1
59	      \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1):
60	           /\ \E BQ \in ByzQuorum :
61	                \A a \in BQ : \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
62	                                           /\ m.mbal =< c
63	                                           /\ (m.mbal = c) => (m.mval = v)
64	           /\ \E WQ \in WeakQuorum :
65	                \A a \in WQ :
66	                  \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
67	                               /\ \E r \in m.m2av : /\ r.bal >= c
68	                                                    /\ r.val = v
69	
70	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
71	
72	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
73	
74	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
75	
76	Quorum == {S \cap Acceptor : S \in ByzQuorum}
77	
78	msgsOfType(t) == {m \in bmsgs : m.type = t }
79	
80	acceptorMsgsOfType(t) == {m \in msgsOfType(t) : m.acc \in  Acceptor}
81	 
82	1bRestrict(m) == [type |-> "1b", acc |-> m.acc, bal |-> m.bal, 
83	                  mbal |-> m.mbal, mval |-> m.mval]
84	
85	1bmsgs == { 1bRestrict(m) : m \in acceptorMsgsOfType("1b") }
86	
87	1cmsgs == {m \in msgsOfType("1c") :
88	                   \E a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)}
89	
90	2amsgs == {m \in [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value] :
91	             \E Q \in Quorum :
92	               \A a \in Q :
93	                 \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") : 
94	                    /\ m2av.acc = a
95	                    /\ m2av.bal = m.bal
96	                    /\ m2av.val = m.val }
97	
98	msgs == msgsOfType("1a") \cup 1bmsgs \cup 1cmsgs \cup 2amsgs 
99	         \cup acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")
100	
101	MaxBallot(S) ==  
102	  IF S = {} THEN -1
103	            ELSE CHOOSE mb \in S : \A x \in S : mb  >= x
104	
105	AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
106	        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
107	          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x
108	
109	1bOr2bMsgs == {m \in bmsgs : m.type \in {"1b", "2b"}}
110	
111	PmaxBal == [a \in Acceptor |-> 
112	              MaxBallot({m.bal : m \in {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : 
113	                                           ma.acc = a}})]
114	
115	P == INSTANCE PConProof WITH maxBal <- PmaxBal
116	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
117	
118	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
119	
120	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
121	
122	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
123	
124	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
125	
126	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
127	
128	chosen == {v \in Value : \E BQ \in ByzQuorum, b \in Ballot :
129	                           \A a \in BQ : \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
130	                                                         /\ m.acc  = a
131	                                                         /\ m.bal  = b
132	                                                         /\ m.val  = v}
133	
134	THEOREM chosen \subseteq P!chosen
135	
136	PROOF OBVIOUS
137	
138	==============================================================================
139	
140

file.content:
---------------------------- MODULE BPConProof_line4176 ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets, TLAPS
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM EmptySetFinite == IsFiniteSet({})

AXIOM SingletonSetFinite == \A e : IsFiniteSet({e})

AXIOM ImageOfFiniteSetFinite == 
         \A S, f : IsFiniteSet(S) => IsFiniteSet({f[x] : x \in S})

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM UnionOfFiniteSetsFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ IsFiniteSet(S)  => IsFiniteSet(S \cup T)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------

CONSTANT Value

Ballot == Nat

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------  

CONSTANTS Acceptor,       
          FakeAcceptor,   
          ByzQuorum,     

          WeakQuorum     

ByzAcceptor == Acceptor \cup FakeAcceptor

ASSUME BallotAssump == (Ballot \cup {-1}) \cap ByzAcceptor = {}

ASSUME BQA == 
          /\ Acceptor \cap FakeAcceptor = {}
          /\ \A Q \in ByzQuorum : Q \subseteq ByzAcceptor
          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in ByzQuorum : Q1 \cap Q2 \cap Acceptor # {}
          /\ \A Q \in WeakQuorum : /\ Q \subseteq ByzAcceptor
                                   /\ Q \cap Acceptor # {}

ASSUME BQLA == 
          /\ \E Q \in ByzQuorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
          /\ \E Q \in WeakQuorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent, bmsgs

KnowsSafeAt(ac, b, v) ==
  LET S == {m \in knowsSent[ac] : m.bal = b}
  IN  \/ \E BQ \in ByzQuorum :
           \A a \in BQ : \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                                      /\ m.mbal = -1
      \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1):
           /\ \E BQ \in ByzQuorum :
                \A a \in BQ : \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                                           /\ m.mbal =< c
                                           /\ (m.mbal = c) => (m.mval = v)
           /\ \E WQ \in WeakQuorum :
                \A a \in WQ :
                  \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                               /\ \E r \in m.m2av : /\ r.bal >= c
                                                    /\ r.val = v

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Quorum == {S \cap Acceptor : S \in ByzQuorum}

msgsOfType(t) == {m \in bmsgs : m.type = t }

acceptorMsgsOfType(t) == {m \in msgsOfType(t) : m.acc \in  Acceptor}
 
1bRestrict(m) == [type |-> "1b", acc |-> m.acc, bal |-> m.bal, 
                  mbal |-> m.mbal, mval |-> m.mval]

1bmsgs == { 1bRestrict(m) : m \in acceptorMsgsOfType("1b") }

1cmsgs == {m \in msgsOfType("1c") :
                   \E a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)}

2amsgs == {m \in [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value] :
             \E Q \in Quorum :
               \A a \in Q :
                 \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") : 
                    /\ m2av.acc = a
                    /\ m2av.bal = m.bal
                    /\ m2av.val = m.val }

msgs == msgsOfType("1a") \cup 1bmsgs \cup 1cmsgs \cup 2amsgs 
         \cup acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")

MaxBallot(S) ==  
  IF S = {} THEN -1
            ELSE CHOOSE mb \in S : \A x \in S : mb  >= x

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

1bOr2bMsgs == {m \in bmsgs : m.type \in {"1b", "2b"}}

PmaxBal == [a \in Acceptor |-> 
              MaxBallot({m.bal : m \in {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : 
                                           ma.acc = a}})]

P == INSTANCE PConProof WITH maxBal <- PmaxBal
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

chosen == {v \in Value : \E BQ \in ByzQuorum, b \in Ballot :
                           \A a \in BQ : \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
                                                         /\ m.acc  = a
                                                         /\ m.bal  = b
                                                         /\ m.val  = v}

THEOREM chosen \subseteq P!chosen

PROOF OBVIOUS

==============================================================================

content.content:
1	---------------------------- MODULE PConProof -------------------------------
2	
3	EXTENDS Integers, TLAPS
4	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
5	
6	CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum
7	
8	ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
9	             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {} 
10	                                                                     
11	Ballot ==  Nat
12	
13	ASSUME BallotAssump == (Ballot \cup {-1}) \cap Acceptor = {}
14	
15	None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Value
16	
17	Message ==      [type : {"1a"}, bal : Ballot]
18	           \cup [type : {"1b"}, acc : Acceptor, bal : Ballot, 
19	                 mbal : Ballot \cup {-1}, mval : Value \cup {None}]
20	           \cup [type : {"1c"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value]
21	           \cup [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value]
22	           \cup [type : {"2b"}, acc : Acceptor, bal : Ballot, val : Value]
23	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
24	
25	VARIABLES maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, msgs
26	
27	sentMsgs(t, b) == {m \in msgs : (m.type = t) /\ (m.bal = b)}
28	
29	ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ==
30	  LET Q1b == {m \in sentMsgs("1b", b) : m.acc \in Q}
31	  IN  /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in Q1b : m.acc = a
32	      /\ \/ \A m \in Q1b : m.mbal = -1
33	         \/ \E m1c \in msgs :
34	              /\ m1c = [type |-> "1c", bal |-> m1c.bal, val |-> v]
35	              /\ \A m \in Q1b : /\ m1c.bal \geq m.mbal
36	                                /\ (m1c.bal = m.mbal) => (m.mval = v)
37	
38	vars == << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, msgs >>
39	
40	ProcSet == (Acceptor) \cup (Ballot)
41	
42	Init == 
43	        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
44	        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
45	        /\ maxVVal = [a \in Acceptor |-> None]
46	        /\ msgs = {}
47	
48	acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
49	                    \/ /\ (b > maxBal[self]) /\ (sentMsgs("1a", b) # {})
50	                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
51	                       /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1b", acc |-> self, bal |-> b,
52	                                               mbal |-> maxVBal[self], mval |-> maxVVal[self]]})
53	                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal>>
54	                    \/ /\ b \geq maxBal[self]
55	                       /\ \E m \in sentMsgs("2a", b):
56	                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
57	                            /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
58	                            /\ maxVVal' = [maxVVal EXCEPT ![self] = m.val]
59	                            /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2b", acc |-> self,
60	                                                       bal |-> b, val |-> m.val]})
61	
62	leader(self) == /\ \/ /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]})
63	                   \/ /\ \E S \in SUBSET Value:
64	                           /\ \A v \in S : \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
65	                           /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in S})
66	                   \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
67	                           /\ /\ sentMsgs("2a", self) = {}
68	                              /\ [type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] \in msgs
69	                           /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2a", bal |-> self, val |-> v]})
70	                /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>
71	
72	Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))
73	           \/ (\E self \in Ballot: leader(self))
74	
75	Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
76	
77	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
78	
79	Phase1a(self) ==
80	  /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]})
81	  /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>
82	
83	Phase1c(self, S) ==
84	  /\ \A v \in S : \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
85	  /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in S})
86	  /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>
87	
88	Phase2a(self, v) ==
89	  /\ sentMsgs("2a", self) = {}
90	  /\ [type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] \in msgs
91	  /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2a", bal |-> self, val |-> v]})
92	  /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>
93	
94	Phase1b(self, b) ==
95	  /\ b > maxBal[self]
96	  /\ sentMsgs("1a", b) # {}
97	  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
98	  /\ msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1b", acc |-> self, bal |-> b,
99	                         mbal |-> maxVBal[self], mval |-> maxVVal[self]]}
100	  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal>>
101	
102	Phase2b(self, b) ==
103	  /\ b \geq maxBal[self]
104	  /\ \E m \in sentMsgs("2a", b):
105	       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
106	       /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
107	       /\ maxVVal' = [maxVVal EXCEPT ![self] = m.val]
108	       /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2b", acc |-> self,
109	                               bal |-> b, val |-> m.val]})
110	
111	TLANext ==
112	  \/ \E self \in Acceptor : 
113	        \E b \in Ballot : \/ Phase1b(self, b) 
114	                          \/ Phase2b(self,b) 
115	  \/ \E self \in Ballot :
116	        \/ Phase1a(self)
117	        \/ \E S \in SUBSET Value : Phase1c(self, S)
118	        \/ \E v \in Value : Phase2a(self, v)
119	
120	THEOREM NextDef == (Next <=> TLANext) 
121	  PROOF OMITTED
122	
123	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
124	
125	TypeOK == /\ maxBal  \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
126	          /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
127	          /\ maxVVal \in [Acceptor -> Value \cup {None}]
128	          /\ msgs \subseteq Message    
129	
130	chosen == {v \in Value : \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
131	                           \A a \in Q : \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
132	                                                        /\ m.acc  = a
133	                                                        /\ m.bal  = b
134	                                                        /\ m.val  = v} 
135	----------------------------------------------------------------------------
136	
137	votes == [a \in Acceptor |->  
138	           {<<m.bal, m.val>> : m \in {mm \in msgs: /\ mm.type = "2b"
139	                                                   /\ mm.acc = a }}]
140	
141	V == INSTANCE VoteProof 
142	
143	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
144	
145	PAccInv == \A a \in Acceptor : 
146	             /\ maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a]
147	             /\ \A b \in (maxVBal[a]+1)..(maxBal[a]-1) : V!DidNotVoteIn(a,b)
148	             /\ (maxVBal[a] # -1) => V!VotedFor(a, maxVBal[a], maxVVal[a])
149	             
150	P1bInv == \A m \in msgs :
151	             (m.type = "1b") => 
152	               /\ (maxBal[m.acc] >= m.bal) /\ (m.bal > m.mbal)
153	               /\ \A b \in (m.mbal+1)..(m.bal-1) : V!DidNotVoteIn(m.acc,b)
154	
155	P1cInv ==  \A m \in msgs : (m.type = "1c") => V!SafeAt(m.bal, m.val)
156	
157	P2aInv == \A m \in msgs : 
158	            (m.type = "2a") => \E m1c \in msgs : /\ m1c.type = "1c"
159	                                                 /\ m1c.bal = m.bal 
160	                                                 /\ m1c.val = m.val
161	
162	THEOREM PT1 == TypeOK /\ P1bInv /\ P1cInv =>
163	                 \A Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
164	                     ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) => V!SafeAt(b, v) 
165	  PROOF OMITTED
166	
167	PInv == TypeOK /\ PAccInv /\ P1bInv /\ P1cInv /\ P2aInv  
168	
169	THEOREM Invariance == Spec => []PInv
170	  PROOF OMITTED
171	
172	THEOREM Implementation == Spec => V!Spec
173	  PROOF OMITTED
174	
175	THEOREM Spec => [](chosen = V!chosen)
176	  PROOF OMITTED
177	
178	=============================================================================
179	
180

file.content:
---------------------------- MODULE PConProof -------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, TLAPS
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {} 
                                                                     
Ballot ==  Nat

ASSUME BallotAssump == (Ballot \cup {-1}) \cap Acceptor = {}

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Value

Message ==      [type : {"1a"}, bal : Ballot]
           \cup [type : {"1b"}, acc : Acceptor, bal : Ballot, 
                 mbal : Ballot \cup {-1}, mval : Value \cup {None}]
           \cup [type : {"1c"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value]
           \cup [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value]
           \cup [type : {"2b"}, acc : Acceptor, bal : Ballot, val : Value]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, msgs

sentMsgs(t, b) == {m \in msgs : (m.type = t) /\ (m.bal = b)}

ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ==
  LET Q1b == {m \in sentMsgs("1b", b) : m.acc \in Q}
  IN  /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in Q1b : m.acc = a
      /\ \/ \A m \in Q1b : m.mbal = -1
         \/ \E m1c \in msgs :
              /\ m1c = [type |-> "1c", bal |-> m1c.bal, val |-> v]
              /\ \A m \in Q1b : /\ m1c.bal \geq m.mbal
                                /\ (m1c.bal = m.mbal) => (m.mval = v)

vars == << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, msgs >>

ProcSet == (Acceptor) \cup (Ballot)

Init == 
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
        /\ maxVVal = [a \in Acceptor |-> None]
        /\ msgs = {}

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ (b > maxBal[self]) /\ (sentMsgs("1a", b) # {})
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1b", acc |-> self, bal |-> b,
                                               mbal |-> maxVBal[self], mval |-> maxVVal[self]]})
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal>>
                    \/ /\ b \geq maxBal[self]
                       /\ \E m \in sentMsgs("2a", b):
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                            /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                            /\ maxVVal' = [maxVVal EXCEPT ![self] = m.val]
                            /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2b", acc |-> self,
                                                       bal |-> b, val |-> m.val]})

leader(self) == /\ \/ /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]})
                   \/ /\ \E S \in SUBSET Value:
                           /\ \A v \in S : \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
                           /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in S})
                   \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                           /\ /\ sentMsgs("2a", self) = {}
                              /\ [type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] \in msgs
                           /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2a", bal |-> self, val |-> v]})
                /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))
           \/ (\E self \in Ballot: leader(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Phase1a(self) ==
  /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]})
  /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>

Phase1c(self, S) ==
  /\ \A v \in S : \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
  /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in S})
  /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>

Phase2a(self, v) ==
  /\ sentMsgs("2a", self) = {}
  /\ [type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] \in msgs
  /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2a", bal |-> self, val |-> v]})
  /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>

Phase1b(self, b) ==
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ sentMsgs("1a", b) # {}
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1b", acc |-> self, bal |-> b,
                         mbal |-> maxVBal[self], mval |-> maxVVal[self]]}
  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal>>

Phase2b(self, b) ==
  /\ b \geq maxBal[self]
  /\ \E m \in sentMsgs("2a", b):
       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
       /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
       /\ maxVVal' = [maxVVal EXCEPT ![self] = m.val]
       /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2b", acc |-> self,
                               bal |-> b, val |-> m.val]})

TLANext ==
  \/ \E self \in Acceptor : 
        \E b \in Ballot : \/ Phase1b(self, b) 
                          \/ Phase2b(self,b) 
  \/ \E self \in Ballot :
        \/ Phase1a(self)
        \/ \E S \in SUBSET Value : Phase1c(self, S)
        \/ \E v \in Value : Phase2a(self, v)

THEOREM NextDef == (Next <=> TLANext) 
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

TypeOK == /\ maxBal  \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxVVal \in [Acceptor -> Value \cup {None}]
          /\ msgs \subseteq Message    

chosen == {v \in Value : \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
                           \A a \in Q : \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
                                                        /\ m.acc  = a
                                                        /\ m.bal  = b
                                                        /\ m.val  = v} 
----------------------------------------------------------------------------

votes == [a \in Acceptor |->  
           {<<m.bal, m.val>> : m \in {mm \in msgs: /\ mm.type = "2b"
                                                   /\ mm.acc = a }}]

V == INSTANCE VoteProof 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

PAccInv == \A a \in Acceptor : 
             /\ maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a]
             /\ \A b \in (maxVBal[a]+1)..(maxBal[a]-1) : V!DidNotVoteIn(a,b)
             /\ (maxVBal[a] # -1) => V!VotedFor(a, maxVBal[a], maxVVal[a])
             
P1bInv == \A m \in msgs :
             (m.type = "1b") => 
               /\ (maxBal[m.acc] >= m.bal) /\ (m.bal > m.mbal)
               /\ \A b \in (m.mbal+1)..(m.bal-1) : V!DidNotVoteIn(m.acc,b)

P1cInv ==  \A m \in msgs : (m.type = "1c") => V!SafeAt(m.bal, m.val)

P2aInv == \A m \in msgs : 
            (m.type = "2a") => \E m1c \in msgs : /\ m1c.type = "1c"
                                                 /\ m1c.bal = m.bal 
                                                 /\ m1c.val = m.val

THEOREM PT1 == TypeOK /\ P1bInv /\ P1cInv =>
                 \A Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
                     ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) => V!SafeAt(b, v) 
  PROOF OMITTED

PInv == TypeOK /\ PAccInv /\ P1bInv /\ P1cInv /\ P2aInv  

THEOREM Invariance == Spec => []PInv
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM Implementation == Spec => V!Spec
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM Spec => [](chosen = V!chosen)
  PROOF OMITTED

=============================================================================

content.text:
This is the Byzantine Paxos (BPCon) consensus proof. The target theorem is `chosen \subseteq P!chosen`. Let me understand the key definitions:

- BPCon `chosen` (line 128): uses `\E BQ \in ByzQuorum`
- `P!chosen` comes from `PConProof`'s `chosen` (line 130-134): uses `\E Q \in Quorum`
- `Quorum == {S \cap Acceptor : S \in ByzQuorum}` (line 76)

Let me run the baseline to see the current error, and check the instance details.

content.text:
The target theorem is essentially a witness substitution: BPCon's `chosen` uses `\E BQ \in ByzQuorum`, while `P!chosen` uses `\E Q \in Quorum` where `Quorum == {S \cap Acceptor : S \in ByzQuorum}`. The key insight is that `BQ \cap Acceptor \in Quorum`, and the same messages work.

Let me check the `check_proof_bin` behavior and the other modules briefly, then write the proof.

content.text: Now I understand the setup. The verdict checks both proof obligations and "cheating" (illegal changes). Let me write the proof. The strategy is a straightforward witness substitution.

input.new_string:
THEOREM chosen \subseteq P!chosen
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in chosen
               PROVE  v \in P!chosen
  OBVIOUS
<1>2. PICK BQ \in ByzQuorum, b \in Ballot :
             \A a \in BQ : \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
                                           /\ m.acc  = a
                                           /\ m.bal  = b
                                           /\ m.val  = v
  BY <1>1 DEF chosen
<1>3. (BQ \cap Acceptor) \in Quorum
  BY DEF Quorum
<1>4. \A a \in (BQ \cap Acceptor) :
          \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
                          /\ m.acc  = a
                          /\ m.bal  = b
                          /\ m.val  = v
  BY <1>2
<1>5. v \in Value
  BY <1>1 DEF chosen
<1>6. b \in P!Ballot
  BY <1>2 DEF Ballot, P!Ballot
<1>7. QED
  BY <1>3, <1>4, <1>5, <1>6 DEF P!chosen

tool_use_result.originalFile:
---------------------------- MODULE BPConProof_line4176 ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets, TLAPS
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM EmptySetFinite == IsFiniteSet({})

AXIOM SingletonSetFinite == \A e : IsFiniteSet({e})

AXIOM ImageOfFiniteSetFinite == 
         \A S, f : IsFiniteSet(S) => IsFiniteSet({f[x] : x \in S})

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM UnionOfFiniteSetsFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ IsFiniteSet(S)  => IsFiniteSet(S \cup T)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------

CONSTANT Value

Ballot == Nat

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------  

CONSTANTS Acceptor,       
          FakeAcceptor,   
          ByzQuorum,     

          WeakQuorum     

ByzAcceptor == Acceptor \cup FakeAcceptor

ASSUME BallotAssump == (Ballot \cup {-1}) \cap ByzAcceptor = {}

ASSUME BQA == 
          /\ Acceptor \cap FakeAcceptor = {}
          /\ \A Q \in ByzQuorum : Q \subseteq ByzAcceptor
          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in ByzQuorum : Q1 \cap Q2 \cap Acceptor # {}
          /\ \A Q \in WeakQuorum : /\ Q \subseteq ByzAcceptor
                                   /\ Q \cap Acceptor # {}

ASSUME BQLA == 
          /\ \E Q \in ByzQuorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
          /\ \E Q \in WeakQuorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, 2avSent, knowsSent, bmsgs

KnowsSafeAt(ac, b, v) ==
  LET S == {m \in knowsSent[ac] : m.bal = b}
  IN  \/ \E BQ \in ByzQuorum :
           \A a \in BQ : \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                                      /\ m.mbal = -1
      \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1):
           /\ \E BQ \in ByzQuorum :
                \A a \in BQ : \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                                           /\ m.mbal =< c
                                           /\ (m.mbal = c) => (m.mval = v)
           /\ \E WQ \in WeakQuorum :
                \A a \in WQ :
                  \E m \in S : /\ m.acc = a
                               /\ \E r \in m.m2av : /\ r.bal >= c
                                                    /\ r.val = v

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Quorum == {S \cap Acceptor : S \in ByzQuorum}

msgsOfType(t) == {m \in bmsgs : m.type = t }

acceptorMsgsOfType(t) == {m \in msgsOfType(t) : m.acc \in  Acceptor}
 
1bRestrict(m) == [type |-> "1b", acc |-> m.acc, bal |-> m.bal, 
                  mbal |-> m.mbal, mval |-> m.mval]

1bmsgs == { 1bRestrict(m) : m \in acceptorMsgsOfType("1b") }

1cmsgs == {m \in msgsOfType("1c") :
                   \E a \in Acceptor : KnowsSafeAt(a, m.bal, m.val)}

2amsgs == {m \in [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value] :
             \E Q \in Quorum :
               \A a \in Q :
                 \E m2av \in acceptorMsgsOfType("2av") : 
                    /\ m2av.acc = a
                    /\ m2av.bal = m.bal
                    /\ m2av.val = m.val }

msgs == msgsOfType("1a") \cup 1bmsgs \cup 1cmsgs \cup 2amsgs 
         \cup acceptorMsgsOfType("2b")

MaxBallot(S) ==  
  IF S = {} THEN -1
            ELSE CHOOSE mb \in S : \A x \in S : mb  >= x

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

1bOr2bMsgs == {m \in bmsgs : m.type \in {"1b", "2b"}}

PmaxBal == [a \in Acceptor |-> 
              MaxBallot({m.bal : m \in {ma \in 1bOr2bMsgs : 
                                           ma.acc = a}})]

P == INSTANCE PConProof WITH maxBal <- PmaxBal
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

chosen == {v \in Value : \E BQ \in ByzQuorum, b \in Ballot :
                           \A a \in BQ : \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
                                                         /\ m.acc  = a
                                                         /\ m.bal  = b
                                                         /\ m.val  = v}

THEOREM chosen \subseteq P!chosen

PROOF OBVIOUS

==============================================================================

                                                          /\ m.val  = v}
 
 THEOREM chosen \subseteq P!chosen
-
-PROOF OBVIOUS
+<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in chosen
+               PROVE  v \in P!chosen
+  OBVIOUS
+<1>2. PICK BQ \in ByzQuorum, b \in Ballot :
+             \A a \in BQ : \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
+                                           /\ m.acc  = a
+                                           /\ m.bal  = b
+                                           /\ m.val  = v
+  BY <1>1 DEF chosen
+<1>3. (BQ \cap Acceptor) \in Quorum
+  BY DEF Quorum
+<1>4. \A a \in (BQ \cap Acceptor) :
+          \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
+                          /\ m.acc  = a
+                          /\ m.bal  = b
+                          /\ m.val  = v
+  BY <1>2
+<1>5. v \in Value
+  BY <1>1 DEF chosen
+<1>6. b \in P!Ballot
+  BY <1>2 DEF Ballot, P!Ballot
+<1>7. QED
+  BY <1>3, <1>4, <1>5, <1>6 DEF P!chosen
 
 ==============================================================================

+++ b/BPConProof_line4176.tla
@@ -132,8 +132,29 @@ chosen == {v \in Value : \E BQ \in ByzQuorum, b \in Ballot :
                                                          /\ m.val  = v}
 
 THEOREM chosen \subseteq P!chosen
-
-PROOF OBVIOUS
+<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in chosen
+               PROVE  v \in P!chosen
+  OBVIOUS
+<1>2. PICK BQ \in ByzQuorum, b \in Ballot :
+             \A a \in BQ : \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
+                                           /\ m.acc  = a
+                                           /\ m.bal  = b
+                                           /\ m.val  = v
+  BY <1>1 DEF chosen
+<1>3. (BQ \cap Acceptor) \in Quorum
+  BY DEF Quorum
+<1>4. \A a \in (BQ \cap Acceptor) :
+          \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
+                          /\ m.acc  = a
+                          /\ m.bal  = b
+                          /\ m.val  = v
+  BY <1>2
+<1>5. v \in Value
+  BY <1>1 DEF chosen
+<1>6. b \in P!Ballot
+  BY <1>2 DEF Ballot, P!Ballot
+<1>7. QED

content.text:
The proof is complete and verified. 

## Summary

The target theorem `chosen \subseteq P!chosen` in `BPConProof_line4176.tla` (the Byzantine Paxos consensus proof) now has a complete, valid TLAPS proof. `./check_proof_bin BPConProof_line4176.tla --level 2` reports **✅ PASS — all obligations proved** with **no cheating detected**, and tlapm confirms **all 15 obligations proved**.

### The proof
The only change was replacing `PROOF OBVIOUS` with a structured proof. The theorem relates two definitions of "chosen value":
- BPCon's `chosen` quantifies over `BQ \in ByzQuorum`
- `P!chosen` (from the instantiated `PConProof` module) quantifies over `Q \in Quorum`, where `Quorum == {S \cap Acceptor : S \in ByzQuorum}`

Both use the *same* `msgs` operator, so no message-set unfolding was needed. The argument is a witness substitution:
1. **`<1>1`** — reduce to showing an arbitrary `v \in chosen` is in `P!chosen`.
2. **`<1>2`** — unfold `chosen` to extract a Byzantine quorum `BQ` and ballot `b` with the required 2b-messages for every acceptor in `BQ`.
3. **`<1>3`** — `BQ \cap Acceptor \in Quorum` (witness `S = BQ` in the `Quorum` set-builder).
4. **`<1>4`** — the messages for `a \in BQ` also serve every `a \in BQ \cap Acceptor`.
5. **`<1>5`/`<1>6`** — discharge the side conditions `v \in Value` and `b \in P!Ballot` (both `Ballot` and `P!Ballot` are `Nat`).
6. **`<1>7`** — combine, instantiating `P!chosen`'s quorum witness with `BQ \cap Acceptor`.

No existing declarations, definitions, assumptions, or the theorem statement were modified — only the proof body was added.
